    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Class PrimitiveBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS>

    Represents an utility class to help build mesh primitives by adding points, lines or triangles

    Inheritance
    object
    PrimitiveBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS>
    Inherited Members
    object.ToString()
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    object.MemberwiseClone()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public abstract class PrimitiveBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS> : IPrimitiveBuilder, IPrimitiveReader<TMaterial> where TvG : struct, IVertexGeometry where TvM : struct, IVertexMaterial where TvS : struct, IVertexSkinning
    Type Parameters
    TMaterial

    The material type used by this PrimitiveBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS> instance.
    TvG

    The vertex fragment type with Position, Normal and Tangent.
    Valid types are:

    • VertexPosition
    • VertexPositionNormal
    • VertexPositionNormalTangent
    TvM

    The vertex fragment type with Colors and Texture Coordinates.
    Valid types are:

    • VertexEmpty
    • VertexColor1
    • VertexTexture1
    • VertexColor1Texture1
    • VertexColor1Texture2
    • VertexColor1Texture1
    • VertexColor2Texture2
    TvS

    The vertex fragment type with Skin Joint Weights.
    Valid types are:

    • VertexEmpty
    • VertexJoints4
    • VertexJoints8

    Constructors

    Name Description
    PrimitiveBuilder(MeshBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS>, PrimitiveBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS>, TMaterial)

    Properties

    Name Description
    Lines

    Gets the list in indices of the lines contained in this primitive.
    Material

    Gets the TMaterial used by this primitive.
    Mesh

    Gets the parent mesh that owns this primitive.
    Points

    Gets the list in indices of the points contained in this primitive.
    Surfaces

    Gets the list in indices of the surfaces contained in this primitive.
    Triangles

    Gets the list in indices of triangles contained in this primitive.
    VertexType

    Gets the type of the vertex used by this primitive.
    Vertices

    Gets the list of vertices used by this primitive.
    VerticesPerPrimitive

    Gets the number of vertices used by each primitive: 1 - Points 2 - Lines 3 - Triangles

    Methods

    Name Description
    AddLine(IVertexBuilder, IVertexBuilder)

    Adds a line.
    AddLine(VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>, VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>)

    Adds a line.
    AddPoint(IVertexBuilder)

    Adds a point.
    AddPoint(VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>)

    Adds a point.
    AddQuadrangle(IVertexBuilder, IVertexBuilder, IVertexBuilder, IVertexBuilder)

    Adds a quadrangle.
    AddQuadrangle(VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>, VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>, VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>, VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>)

    Adds a quadrangle.
    AddTriangle(IVertexBuilder, IVertexBuilder, IVertexBuilder)

    Adds a triangle.
    AddTriangle(VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>, VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>, VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>)

    Adds a triangle.
    ContainsVertex(in VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>)

    Checks if a vertex is already in the vertex buffer.
    GetIndices()

    Calculates the raw list of indices to use for this primitive.
    TransformVertices(Func<VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>, VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>>)
    UseVertex(in VertexBuilder<TvG, TvM, TvS>)

    Adds or reuses a vertex.
    Validate()
